_comment_page_title: Page heading for the recipes catalog browse page
_comment_page_subtitle: Subtitle below the page heading describing the catalog purpose
page_subtitle: Curated, tool-specific use cases — adopt one to add a capability to your persona
_comment_available_label: Badge/count label showing how many recipes are available
_comment_search_placeholder: Placeholder text for the recipe search input
_comment_category_filter_aria: Aria label for the category filter control
_comment_category_filter_prefix: Prefix label shown before the selected category name
_comment_category_all: Option label to show all categories
_comment_eligibility_ready_label: Eligibility filter tab — ready to adopt
_comment_eligibility_setup_label: Eligibility filter tab — needs connector setup
eligibility_no_persona: पात्रता जांचने के लिए एक पर्सोना चुनें
adopted_badge_tooltip: चयनित पर्सोना ने इसे पहले ही अपना लिया है
_comment_no_results_heading: Empty state heading when search/filter returns nothing
_comment_no_results_body: Empty state body below the heading
no_results_body: Try a different search term or filter.
_comment_col_recipe: Table column header for recipe name
_comment_col_eligibility: Table column header for eligibility status
_comment_adopt_button: Button label to adopt a recipe from the table row
chip_eligible_tooltip: Ready to adopt — every required connector is wired on the selected persona.
_comment_back_to_catalog: Back button label in the recipe detail panel
_comment_adopt_tooltip_no_persona: Adopt button tooltip when no persona is selected
adopt_tooltip_no_persona: Pick a persona from the sidebar first.
_comment_adopt_tooltip_needs_setup: Adopt button tooltip when connectors are missing
adopt_tooltip_needs_setup: Wire {count} more connector{count, plural, one {} other {s}}, then adopt
_comment_adopt_tooltip_ready: Adopt button tooltip when recipe is ready to adopt
adopt_tooltip_ready: Adopt this recipe into your selected persona
_comment_adopt_with_setup_label: Adopt button label when setup is required
_comment_detail_by_prefix: Author attribution prefix in detail panel
_comment_banner_setup_title: Banner title when connector setup is required
_comment_banner_setup_body_prefix: First part of the connector setup banner body
_comment_banner_setup_body_suffix: Trailing part of the connector setup banner body
banner_setup_body_suffix: wired on this persona before it can run. The adopt flow walks you through.
_comment_banner_locked_title: Banner title when recipe is not available
_comment_about_heading: Section heading for the About block
_comment_what_it_does_heading: Section heading for the What it does block
_comment_what_it_needs_heading: Section heading for the What it needs block
_comment_spec_notifications_none: Value shown when no notifications are configured
_comment_trigger_manual: Spec row value for a manual trigger type
_comment_required_connectors_heading: Section heading for required connectors list
_comment_optional_connectors_heading: Section heading for optional connectors list
_comment_optional_connectors_qualifier: Qualifier suffix after optional connectors heading
_comment_bindings_count_one: Singular binding count sentence shown during adoption
bindings_count_one: You'll fill in {count} setting during adoption
_comment_bindings_count_other: Plural binding count sentence shown during adoption
bindings_count_other: You'll fill in {count} settings during adoption
_comment_tags_heading: Section heading for the tags list
_comment_binding_kind_slack_channel: Binding kind label for Slack channel
_comment_binding_kind_drive_folder: Binding kind label for Google Drive folder
_comment_binding_kind_github_repo: Binding kind label for GitHub repository
_comment_binding_kind_enum: Binding kind label for enumerated choice
_comment_modal_title: Modal title — interpolated with recipe name
_comment_modal_subtitle_persona: Modal subtitle when a persona is selected
_comment_modal_subtitle_no_persona: Modal subtitle when no persona is selected
_comment_callout_setup_title: Callout title when connector setup is needed
callout_setup_body: This persona needs the following connectors wired before adoption:
_comment_callout_setup_vault_link: Callout link text pointing to the Vault
callout_setup_vault_link: Wire them in the Vault, then return here.
_comment_callout_incompatible_title: Callout title when recipe is incompatible
_comment_configure_settings_one: Button label singular — settings to configure
_comment_configure_settings_other: Button label plural — settings to configure
_comment_missing_settings_one: Validation message singular — required settings missing
_comment_missing_settings_other: Validation message plural — required settings missing
_comment_adopting_label: Button label while adoption is in progress
_comment_adopt_recipe_label: Button label to confirm recipe adoption
_comment_no_persona_heading: Empty state heading when no persona is selected in modal
_comment_no_persona_body: Empty state body when no persona is selected in modal
no_persona_body: Pick a persona from the sidebar, then come back to adopt this recipe.
_comment_placeholder_slack_single: Input placeholder for single Slack channel binding
_comment_placeholder_slack_multi: Input placeholder for multi Slack channel binding
_comment_placeholder_drive_folder: Input placeholder for Drive folder binding
_comment_placeholder_github_single: Input placeholder for single GitHub repo binding
_comment_placeholder_github_multi: Input placeholder for multi GitHub repo binding
_comment_placeholder_email_single: Input placeholder for single email binding
_comment_placeholder_email_multi: Input placeholder for multi email binding
_comment_placeholder_cron: Input placeholder for cron schedule binding
_comment_adopted_toast: Toast shown after a recipe is successfully adopted
_comment_adopted_badge: Chip on rows/detail the selected persona already adopted — keep 1 word
_comment_col_connectors: Table column header: required connector icons — keep 1 word
_comment_eligibility_no_persona: Tooltip/aria on the neutral dash shown in the eligibility column before any persona is selected
_comment_error_handling_label: Block label above failure-handling prose — keep short
_comment_event_emit_label: aria/direction label: recipe emits this event — keep 1 word
_comment_event_listen_label: aria/direction label: recipe listens for this event — keep 1 word
_comment_events_label: Spec-row label for the event subscriptions chips — keep 1 word
_comment_guardrails_heading: Detail-view card heading covering review policy, memory and failure handling
_comment_memory_off_label: Badge: no cross-run memory — keep 1 word
_comment_memory_on_label: Badge: agent persists memory across runs — keep 1 word
_comment_param_default_label: Prefix before a parameter default value chip, e.g. Default: 48
_comment_parameters_heading: Detail card sub-heading above the tunable input list — keep 1 word
_comment_published_label: Precedes a relative timestamp, e.g. Published · 3 days ago
_comment_review_mode_always: Badge: every run is human-reviewed — keep 1 word
_comment_review_mode_conditional: Badge: review depends on confidence/conditions — keep 1 word
_comment_review_mode_never: Badge: output ships without human review — keep 1 word
_comment_tag_filter_tooltip: Tooltip on clickable tag chips in recipe detail
